task_completion.description: The title 'Piano Keys' is added to the flipchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text object containing exactly 'Piano Keys' prominently displayed on the ActivInspire canvas.

task_completion.description: Seven white keys are drawn and arranged side-by-side.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 7 adjacent, vertically oriented rectangles (typically white with borders) representing the natural keys of a piano octave.

task_completion.description: Five black keys are drawn and arranged in the correct piano pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 5 smaller, vertically oriented black rectangles placed overlapping the upper portions of the white keys. They must be arranged in a group of 2 and a group of 3, with a gap between the groups.

task_completion.description: The white keys are correctly labeled with musical notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels 'C', 'D', 'E', 'F', 'G', 'A', and 'B' placed on or near the white keys in sequential order from left to right.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and the filename 'piano_keyboard.flipchart', or the ActivInspire title bar updating to 'piano_keyboard.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with the ActivInspire toolbar, shape tools, and text tools rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The diagram is constructed using individual shapes and text boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent drawing individual rectangles and placing individual text boxes, rather than pasting a single pre-made image of a piano keyboard from a web browser.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking File > Save/Save As and navigating the file explorer dialog to save the flipchart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is an ActivInspire flipchart saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/piano_keyboard.flipchart'. The diagram must contain at least 12 rectangles (7 white keys, 5 black keys). The black keys must be arranged in groups of 2 and 3. The canvas must include the exact text 'Piano Keys' and the labels 'C', 'D', 'E', 'F', 'G', 'A', 'B'.
